list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names with FormEditor
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use FormEditor and the Form facade to retrieve all AcroForm field names and output them to the console.

add-text-field-to-pdf.title: Add Text Field to PDF with FormEditor
add-text-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a new text field at specific coordinates to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

fill-textbox-field-pdf.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-textbox-field-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a textbox AcroForm field by name, set its value with Form.FillField, and save the updated PDF.

justify-text-in-pdf-form-textbox.title: Justify Text in a PDF Form TextBox
justify-text-in-pdf-form-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to set justified alignment for a filled textbox in an existing PDF form using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.title: Retrieve Radio Button Options and Store in Hashtable
retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a radio button group, read its option values using the Form facade, and transfer those values into a Hashtable.

get-selected-radio-button-value.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
get-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to read the currently selected option of a radio button group in an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field values from a PDF document into an XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export AcroForm field values from a PDF document into an FDF file via a file stream.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF into an XFDF file and write the result to disk.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field values from a PDF into a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and validates the resulting JSON structure.

import-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
import-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF.

import-form-data-from-fdf.title: Import Form Data from FDF into PDF
import-form-data-from-fdf.description: Shows how to load an FDF file, import its field values into an existing PDF form using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file and import its form field values into an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form
import-json-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file using the Form facade, optionally inspect import results, and save the updated PDF.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, bind each with FormEditor, and export its AcroForm fields to individual XML files.

batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import JSON Data into PDFs in Parallel
batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to import form data from JSON files into matching PDF forms concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

combine-acroform-json-exports.title: Combine AcroForm JSON Exports from Multiple PDFs
combine-acroform-json-exports.description: Exports form data from several PDF files to JSON, merges the individual JSON objects into a single JSON array, and writes the combined result to a file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF directly to an XML string via a MemoryStream, eliminating the need for intermediate files on disk.

merge-acroform-data-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into JSON
merge-acroform-data-from-multiple-pdfs.description: The example loads several PDF files containing AcroForm fields, extracts each document's form data as JSON, and aggregates the values per field into a single JSON file.

export-customer-acroform-fields-to-xml.title: Export Customer AcroForm Fields to XML
export-customer-acroform-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to filter PDF form fields whose names start with "Customer" and write the selected field names and values to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, filter specific AcroForm fields by name, and write their values to a formatted JSON file.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form While Ignoring Missing Fields
import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to load JSON, filter out entries that don't exist in a PDF AcroForm, and import the filtered data into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-form.title: Validate XML with XSD and Import into PDF Form
validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and then import the validated data into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

unicode-acroform-import-export.title: Import and Export AcroForm Fields with Unicode (UTF‑8)
unicode-acroform-import-export.description: Demonstrates how to preserve Unicode characters in AcroForm fields by exporting to XFDF/XML and importing back using UTF‑8 encoding with Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: List PDF Form Fields and Export to CSV
list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates all AcroForm fields using FormEditor and Form, retrieves each field's type, and writes the field name and type to a CSV report.

export-pdf-text-field-names-to-json.title: Export PDF Text Field Names to JSON
export-pdf-text-field-names-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the names of text-type AcroForm fields, and writes them to a formatted JSON array.

add-radio-button-group-with-default-sele.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
add-radio-button-group-with-default-sele.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory PDF, binding a FormEditor, defining a three‑option radio‑button group, setting a default selected option programmatically, and saving the document.

verify-radio-button-options.title: Verify Radio Button Options in PDF Form
verify-radio-button-options.description: Opens a PDF form, extracts the option names of a specified radio button field, and compares them with an expected set to validate form integrity.

export-import-acroform-xfdf-roundtrip.title: Export and Import AcroForm Data via XFDF (Round‑Trip)
export-import-acroform-xfdf-roundtrip.description: Demonstrates how to export PDF form fields to an XFDF stream, import the XFDF back into a new PDF, and verify that the field values remain unchanged after the round‑trip.

fill-pdf-form-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form from JSON using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-pdf-form-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to load an AcroForm PDF, import field values from a JSON file, and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, fills specified AcroForm fields using the Form facade, and returns the updated PDF as a byte array.

extract-pdf-form-field-names.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names to JSON
extract-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, retrieve all AcroForm field names, and output them as a JSON array from a command‑line utility.

fill-acroform-pdf-fields.title: Fill AcroForm PDF Fields and Save
fill-acroform-pdf-fields.description: Shows how to open an AcroForm PDF with Aspose.Pdf, populate its form fields from a dictionary, and save the resulting filled PDF.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Deserialize with Json.NET
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to JSON using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then deserialize the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# object with Json.NET.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v3.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form
import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v3.description: Demonstrates serializing a C# object to JSON, loading it into a memory stream, and importing the data into an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-chunks.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Split into Chunks
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-chunks.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON document using Aspose.Pdf and then split the JSON into multiple files, each containing up to 100 fields.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-html.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Convert to HTML with XSLT
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-html.description: Shows how to create a simple AcroForm PDF, export its field values to an XML file using the Form facade, and transform the XML into an HTML view with an XSLT stylesheet.

import-xml-data-into-pdf-form-validate-r.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form and Validate Required Fields
import-xml-data-into-pdf-form-validate-r.description: Demonstrates importing form data from an XML file into a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then validates that required fields are not empty and logs any violations.

import-json-into-pdf-form-handle-missing.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form with Missing Field Handling
import-json-into-pdf-form-handle-missing.description: Demonstrates how to import JSON data into an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade and handle missing form fields by catching PdfException and extracting the field name.

async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to wrap the synchronous Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.ExportXml method in Task.Run to export AcroForm data from a PDF to an XML file without blocking the UI thread.

generate-pdf-form-field-report.title: Generate PDF Form Field Report Table
generate-pdf-form-field-report.description: Creates a PDF report that lists all AcroForm fields with their names, types, and values in a table appended to the original document.
